issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: sb.append("⚠️ **کنترل تراز مخارج**: متاسفانه مخارج شما در این دوره بیش از درآمدتان بوده است (${String.format("%.1f", savingRate)}٪ کسری). توصیه می‌شود خریدهای غیرضروری خود را به زمان بهتری موکول کرده و روی کالاهای اساسی متمرکز شوید.\n\n")

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: sb.append("📉 **بهبود نرخ پس‌انداز**: شما حدود ${String.format("%.1f", savingRate)}٪ از درآمد خود را پس‌انداز کرده‌اید. برای داشتن پشتوانه مالی مطمئن‌تر، تلاش کنید با کاهش مخارج کوچکِ روزمره، این نسبت را به حداقل ۲۰٪ برسانید.\n\n")

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: sb.append("🎉 **عملکرد عالی پس‌انداز**: آفرین! شما توانسته‌اید بیش از ${String.format("%.1f", savingRate)}٪ از درآمد خود را پس‌انداز کنید. این روند فوق‌العاده را برای ثروت‌آفرینی بیشتر ادامه دهید.\n\n")

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Call requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.LocalDate#now`
issue.errorLine1: "daysFromNow": integer (calculate actual days from today to the Jalali date specified. Today's date is ${java.time.LocalDate.now()}. If text says '25 تیر', convert that Jalali date to Gregorian and compute days from today),

issue.message: Call requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.Instant#atZone`

Field requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24): `java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit#DAYS`
Implicit cast from `LocalDate` to `Temporal` requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24)
Implicit cast from `LocalDate` to `Temporal` requires API level 26, or core library desugaring (current min is 24)

The image `ic_launcher.webp` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.webp: 48x48 dp (72x72 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.webp: 48x48 dp (96x96 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.webp: 12268x3140438 dp (36803x9421313 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.webp` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.webp: 48x48 dp (72x72 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.webp: 48x48 dp (96x96 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.webp: 12268x3140438 dp (36803x9421313 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.webp: 12273x3141760 dp (49091x12567041 px)
